catalog.title: Quality criteria catalog
catalog.subtitle: Criteria published by the quality lead — read-only.

checklist.intro: Check each criterion when the report meets the rule for this review.
checklist.emptyManager: No criteria distributed to this report yet. Distribute them from quality administration.
checklist.emptyReader: No active criteria on this report yet.

admin.title: Criteria administration
admin.subtitle: Define, publish, and distribute quality rules (global quality checker role).

distribution.title: Distribution
distribution.intro: Separate from defining the criterion: pick a published criterion, then a target object. Some types require a specific instance id; others apply to all instances. Each type has its own workflow (check UI).
distribution.scopeSpecific: Scoped to one instance id (one distribution per instance)
distribution.scopeGlobal: Applies to all instances of this type
distribution.workflowReport: Report workflow: Criteria tab on draft review, checkboxes for QC.
distribution.workflowPathCourse: Path course workflow: not implemented yet (no checklist UI).
distribution.workflowPending: Distribution disabled until this type’s workflow is shipped.
distribution.noDrafts: No report drafts available for your teams.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm deletion
deleteConfirm.message: Delete “{{label}}”? Related distributions and checks will be removed.

errors.distribute: Choose a published criterion, a target type, and an id when required.
